_about: Curated ERCOT constraint station-code -> verified coordinate crosswalk. Every entry is corroborated by at least two independent sources: the ERCOT SCED constraint/contingency element name (which spells out the line endpoint) AND an independent public GIS record (HIFLD and/or OpenStreetMap) for a station of that name at a location consistent with the named counterpart and voltage. No coordinate is taken from a city-name guess; fuzzy matching is not loosened. See station_crosswalk.py.

entries.source: ERCOT SCED contingencies SRGRMGS5/MRGRMGS5 (MGS = Morgan Creek) at 345 kV, corroborated by OpenStreetMap 'Morgan Creek Substation' 345 kV (32.3343,-100.9159), Mitchell County
ERCOT SCED code VENSW + contingency SVENFTS5 (VEN) at 345 kV, corroborated by HIFLD 'VENUS' 345 kV (Ellis Co) and OSM 'Venus Substation' 345 kV (32.4440,-97.0728)
ERCOT SCED constraint HON_DEVI_1 (Hondo-Devine line) at 69 kV, corroborated by HIFLD/OSM 'Devine' 69 kV substation (29.1253,-98.9243), Medina County adjacent to Hondo

ERCOT SCED constraint NUECES_WHITE_2_1 (Nueces-White Point line), corroborated by OSM 'Whitepoint Substation' (27.9358,-97.3609) near Corpus Christi; constraint references the 138 kV bus at the same site

ERCOT SCED constraint COLETO_VICTOR2_1 (Coleto-Victoria line), corroborated by OSM 'Coleto Creek Substation' (28.7169,-97.2128) adjacent to Victoria; constraint references the 138 kV bus at the same site

ERCOT SCED constraint HARGRO_TWINBU1_1 (Hargrove-Twin Buttes line), corroborated by HIFLD/OSM 'Twin Buttes' (31.5137,-100.5980) near San Angelo, Tom Green County; constraint references the 138 kV bus at the same site
ERCOT SCED constraint FWLRTN_TILDEN_1 (Fowlerton-Tilden line), corroborated by OSM 'Fowlerton Substation' (28.3715,-98.8008) in La Salle County; constraint references the 138 kV bus at the same site
ERCOT SCED constraint BERGHE_AT1H (Bergheim autotransformer), corroborated by HIFLD 'BERGHEIM' 138 kV (Comal Co) and OSM 'Bergheim Substation' (29.7887,-98.5263)
